dev.jeka.core.api.file

Class JkPathSequence

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.jeka.core.api.file.JkPathSequence
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Iterable<java.nio.file.Path>

    public final class JkPathSequence
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.lang.Iterable<java.nio.file.Path>, java.io.Serializable
    A sequence of file path (folder or archive). Each file is called an entry.
    Instances of this class are immutable.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      JkPathSequence and(java.lang.Iterable<java.nio.file.Path> otherEntries)
      Returns a JkPathSequence made of, in the order, the entries of this one plus the specified ones.
      JkPathSequence and(java.nio.file.Path path1, java.nio.file.Path path2, java.nio.file.Path... others) 
      JkPathSequence andPrepend(java.lang.Iterable<java.nio.file.Path> paths)
      Returns a JkPathSequence made of the specified entries followed by the sequence entries of this object.
      JkPathSequence andPrepend(java.nio.file.Path path1, java.nio.file.Path path2, java.nio.file.Path... entries) 
      boolean equals(java.lang.Object o) 
      java.nio.file.Path findEntryContainingClass(java.lang.String className)
      Returns the first entry of this classpath containing the given class.
      java.util.List<java.nio.file.Path> getEntries()
      Returns this sequence as a list.
      java.nio.file.Path getEntry(int index) 
      java.util.List<java.nio.file.Path> getNonExistingFiles() 
      int hashCode() 
      boolean hasNonExisting() 
      java.util.Iterator<java.nio.file.Path> iterator() 
      JkPathSequence normalized() 
      static JkPathSequence of() 
      static JkPathSequence of(java.lang.Iterable<java.nio.file.Path> paths)
      Creates a JkPathSequence from an Iterable of paths or a single Path.
      static JkPathSequence of(java.nio.file.Path path1, java.nio.file.Path path2, java.nio.file.Path... others)
      Creates a JkPathSequence form specified entries
      static JkPathSequence of(java.nio.file.Path baseDir, java.lang.String relativePathsAsString)
      Creates a JkPathSequence from a base directory and string of relative paths separated with a ";".
      static JkPathSequence ofPathString(java.lang.String pathString) 
      static JkPathSequence ofSysPropClassPath()
      Returns the current classpath as given by System.getProperty("java.class.path").
      static JkPathSequence readFrom(java.nio.file.Path path)
      Reads the contents of a file at the given path and returns a JkPathSequence object representing the paths extracted from the file contents.
      static JkPathSequence readFromQuietly(java.nio.file.Path path)
      Same as readFrom(java.nio.file.Path) but returns an empty {@link JkPathSequence if the file does not exist.
      JkPathSequence relativizeFromWorkingDir()
      Returns an identical path sequence but replacing relative paths with absolute paths resolved from the specified base directory.
      JkPathSequence resolvedTo(java.nio.file.Path baseDir)
      Returns an identical path sequence but replacing relative paths with absolute paths resolved from the specified base directory.
      java.lang.String toColonSeparatedPath()
      Returns the file names concatenated with ':'
      java.lang.String toPath()
      Returns the file names concatenated with ';' on Windows and ':' on unix.
      java.lang.String toPathMultiLine(java.lang.String margin) 
      java.util.Set<java.nio.file.Path> toSet() 
      java.lang.String toString() 
      java.net.URL[] toUrls() 
      JkPathSequence withoutDuplicates()
      Returns a JkPathSequence identical to this one but without duplicates.
      void writeTo(java.nio.file.Path path)
      Writes the contents of this JkPathSequence to the specified file path.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, finalize, getClass, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

      • Methods inherited from interface java.lang.Iterable

        forEach, spliterator

    • Method Detail

      • of

        public static JkPathSequence of(java.lang.Iterable<java.nio.file.Path> paths)
        Creates a JkPathSequence from an Iterable of paths or a single Path.
        Parameters:
        paths - As Path class implements { @link Iterable } the argument can be a single Path instance, if so it will be interpreted as a list containing a single element which is this argument.

      • of

        public static JkPathSequence of()

      • readFrom

        public static JkPathSequence readFrom(java.nio.file.Path path)
        Reads the contents of a file at the given path and returns a JkPathSequence object representing the paths extracted from the file contents. The file content is supposed to be have been written using writeTo(java.nio.file.Path)

        Throws:
        java.io.UncheckedIOException - if the file does not exist.

      • readFromQuietly

        public static JkPathSequence readFromQuietly(java.nio.file.Path path)
        Same as readFrom(java.nio.file.Path) but returns an empty {@link JkPathSequence if the file does not exist.

      • ofPathString

        public static JkPathSequence ofPathString(java.lang.String pathString)

      • of

        public static JkPathSequence of(java.nio.file.Path baseDir,
                                java.lang.String relativePathsAsString)
        Creates a JkPathSequence from a base directory and string of relative paths separated with a ";".

      • of

        public static JkPathSequence of(java.nio.file.Path path1,
                                java.nio.file.Path path2,
                                java.nio.file.Path... others)
        Creates a JkPathSequence form specified entries

      • ofSysPropClassPath

        public static JkPathSequence ofSysPropClassPath()
        Returns the current classpath as given by System.getProperty("java.class.path").

      • withoutDuplicates

        public JkPathSequence withoutDuplicates()
        Returns a JkPathSequence identical to this one but without duplicates. If a given file in this sequence exist twice or more, then only the first occurrence is kept in the returned sequence.

      • normalized

        public JkPathSequence normalized()

      • getEntries

        public java.util.List<java.nio.file.Path> getEntries()
        Returns this sequence as a list.

      • getEntry

        public java.nio.file.Path getEntry(int index)

      • iterator

        public java.util.Iterator<java.nio.file.Path> iterator()
        Specified by:
        iterator in interface java.lang.Iterable<java.nio.file.Path>

      • andPrepend

        public JkPathSequence andPrepend(java.nio.file.Path path1,
                                 java.nio.file.Path path2,
                                 java.nio.file.Path... entries)
        See Also:
        andPrepend(Iterable)

      • andPrepend

        public JkPathSequence andPrepend(java.lang.Iterable<java.nio.file.Path> paths)
        Returns a JkPathSequence made of the specified entries followed by the sequence entries of this object.
        Parameters:
        paths - As Path class implements { @link Iterable } the argument can be a single Path instance, if so it will be interpreted as a list containing a single element which is this argument.

      • and

        public JkPathSequence and(java.nio.file.Path path1,
                          java.nio.file.Path path2,
                          java.nio.file.Path... others)
        See Also:
        and(Iterable)

      • and

        public JkPathSequence and(java.lang.Iterable<java.nio.file.Path> otherEntries)
        Returns a JkPathSequence made of, in the order, the entries of this one plus the specified ones.

      • resolvedTo

        public JkPathSequence resolvedTo(java.nio.file.Path baseDir)
        Returns an identical path sequence but replacing relative paths with absolute paths resolved from the specified base directory.

      • relativizeFromWorkingDir

        public JkPathSequence relativizeFromWorkingDir()
        Returns an identical path sequence but replacing relative paths with absolute paths resolved from the specified base directory.

      • toPath

        public java.lang.String toPath()
        Returns the file names concatenated with ';' on Windows and ':' on unix.

      • toColonSeparatedPath

        public java.lang.String toColonSeparatedPath()
        Returns the file names concatenated with ':'

      • toPathMultiLine

        public java.lang.String toPathMultiLine(java.lang.String margin)

      • toSet

        public java.util.Set<java.nio.file.Path> toSet()

      • toUrls

      • getNonExistingFiles

        public java.util.List<java.nio.file.Path> getNonExistingFiles()

      • findEntryContainingClass

        public java.nio.file.Path findEntryContainingClass(java.lang.String className)
        Returns the first entry of this classpath containing the given class.

      • writeTo

        public void writeTo(java.nio.file.Path path)
        Writes the contents of this JkPathSequence to the specified file path.
